html:
Exclusive to:

GenericChoppedBurningSapling

“The vines uproot more than boulders, depending on where they are planted.”

-

Boulderboughs are trees that can be found in the Fumarole Biome, they grow a big boulder with vines hanging off of it. The boulder appears in two different shapes and affects the damage it deals and its AoE range when the boulder drops. Mobs and players standing next to the tree when the boulder drops (e.g. chopping or burning the stem) will be damaged and knocked back. The player can run away after chopping it to dodge the boulder. If any player in range of the drop has a Thulecite Crown, W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear or Dreadstone Helm equipped, the falling boulder will bounce and the player will have more time to dodge.

Type AoE range Damage to player Damage to mobs
lower 50 200
higher 25 100

Contents

  • 1 Drops
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Drops

When the boulder drops, the vines will drop 5 items. These are determined by the area the tree grew in. The fallen Boulderbough will always drop the same items. Burning the tree destroys the vines and their loot and mining it will drop Charcoal instead of the seed.

This list mainly includes major biomes and is not exhaustive. The loot is set when the tree is created.

If a tree grows on Sticky Webbing, it has a higher chance to drop Silk. If a tree grows in the Caves, the drop chance for Glow Berries depends on the strength of Depths Worms attacks and increases with time.

Tips

  • When playing as WX-78 with Gamma Circuits Tinkering II, the Spin-Cycle Circuit can be used to avoid taking damage when chopping down a Boulderbough. This is because it causes the player to hit the boulder with their axe as it falls, knocking the player back and away from damage. Axes do not lose extra durability when doing this.

Trivia

  • Boulderboughs were introduced in the Ancient Echoes update.

Exclusive to:
GenericChoppedBurningSapling
“Looks vine to me.”
–Wilson
“I know what to do.”
–Willow
“Strong trunk! Like Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“Those vines carry a heavy burden.”
–Wendy
“STRUCTURAL WEAKNESS IDENTIFIED”
–WX-78
“The plant's structural integrity appears more than sufficient to bear the considerable mass of the boulder.”
–Wickerbottom
“Shall we, Luce?”
–Woodie
“What's that rock doing up there?”
–Maxwell
“This stöut sapling be a mighty champiön indeed, bearin' alöft a böulder fit tö crush lesser föes!”
–Wigfrid
“When the bough breaks...”
–Webber
“Hm. Minerals and fiber.”
–Warly
“Good vine friend!”
–Wormwood
“Lookin' a lil' top heavy.”
–Winona
“The rock? I see it, but how to free it?”
–Wortox
“Me make it florp.”
–Wurt
“How to free the stone? What a burning question to axe!”
–Walter
“Looks like a quick job.”
–Wanda
“It lacks support.”
–Wilson, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“It's being a rock.”
–Willow, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“Wolfgang can lift. Just don't want to now.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“It lost its only support.”
–Wendy, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“OF COURSE THE ORGANIC COMPONENT FAILED”
–WX-78, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“The boulder is ready to be mined.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“Did anyone yell "Boulder!"?”
–Woodie, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“Someone should mine it now.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“Nöw, the spöils like ripe för the taking.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“We'll mine it!”
–Webber, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“It is ready to harvest.”
–Warly, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“Where vine friend?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“That'll leave a dent.”
–Winona, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“It's mine to mine!”
–Wortox, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“Haha! Florpt!”
–Wurt, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“Now we can mine it!”
–Walter, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“Time to mine.”
–Wanda, when examining a Boulderbough whose boulder has dropped
“It looks a little hot under the collar.”
–Wilson
“Mm. Yeah.”
–Willow
“You will not crush Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“The fall is inevitable.”
–Wendy
“CARBONIZING”
–WX-78
“Combusting the arboreal support structure will facilitate unobstructed access to the minerals.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's one way to go about it.”
–Woodie
“Ugh, it's so hot.”
–Maxwell
“The flames döth devöur the nöble sapling! Aye, its final saga draws tö a clöse.”
–Wigfrid
“Get out of the way!”
–Webber
“Smells like roasting vegetables.”
–Warly
“Friend too hot!”
–Wormwood
“It's gonna drop any second.”
–Winona
“Torch the trunk and then kerplunk!”
–Wortox
“About to florp!”
–Wurt
“Watch out, Wobes!”
–Walter
“The stone will fall any time now.”
–Wanda
“It had a rocky start.”
–Wilson
“Still a bit young to burn.”
–Willow
“One day, you grow big and mighty like Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“It can only go wrong from here.”
–Wendy
“INSTALLED”
–WX-78
“The Boulderbough gradually accumulates minerals from its surroundings, maturing until it may be harvested.”
–Wickerbottom
“I can't wait to see it full grown...”
–Woodie
“These things take forever.”
–Maxwell
“A greenling that may be öf söme wörth, ör sö the tale göes.”
–Wigfrid
“They grow up so fast!”
–Webber
“A fine young sapling.”
–Warly
“Hey kid”
–Wormwood
“Tough little darlin'.”
–Winona
“What's happening, sapling?”
–Wortox
“Grow, grow grow!”
–Wurt
“It's going to grow up big and strong!”
–Walter
“It has its whole life ahead of it.”
–Wanda
“The vines uproot more than boulders, depending on where they are planted.”
-

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Boulderboughs là những cây có thể được tìm thấy trong Quần xã Fumarole, chúng mọc lên một tảng đá lớn với những dây leo bám trên đó. Tảng đá xuất hiện với hai hình dạng khác nhau và ảnh hưởng đến sát thương mà nó gây ra cũng như phạm vi AoE của nó khi tảng đá rơi xuống. Mob và người chơi đứng cạnh cây khi tảng đá rơi xuống (ví dụ: chặt hoặc đốt thân cây) sẽ bị hư hại và bị đẩy lùi. Người chơi có thể bỏ chạy sau khi chặt nó để né tảng đá. Nếu bất kỳ người chơi nào trong phạm vi thả có Vương miện Thulecite, W.A.R.B.I.S. Được trang bị Head Gear hoặc Dreadstone Helm, tảng đá rơi sẽ nảy lên và người chơi sẽ…

This is because it causes the player to hit the boulder with their axe as it falls, knocking the player back and away from damage. Axes do not lose extra durability when doing this. =={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Boulderboughs were introduced in the [[Ancient Echoes]] update. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Boulderbough Build.png|Idle Boulderbough Build 2.png|Idle Boulderbough Short Build.png|Short Idle Boulderbough Short Build 2.png|Short Idle 2 Boulderbough Burnt.png|Burnt Boulderbough Burnt 2.png|Burnt 2 Boulderbough Short Burnt.png|Short Burnt Boulderbough Short Burnt 2.png|Short Burnt 2 Boulderbough Fall Burnt.png|Fall Burnt Boulderbough Fall Burnt 2.png|Fall Burnt 2 Boulderbough Fall Mined Build.png|Fall Mined Build Boulderbough Fall Mined Burnt.png|Fall Mined Burnt Boulderbough Fall Mined 2 Build.png|Fall Mined 2 Build Boulderbough Fall Mined 2 Burnt.png|Fall Mined 2 Burnt Boulderbough Rocks.png|Rocks on tree Boulderbough Rocks 2.png|Rocks on tree 2 Boulderbough Rocks 3.png|Rocks on tree 3 Boulderbough Flint.png|Flint on tree Boulderbough Nitre.png|Nitre on tree Boulderbough Gold Nugget.png|Gold Nugget on tree Boulderbough Moon Rock.png|Moon Rock on tree Boulderbough Moon Shard.png|Moon Shard on tree Boulderbough Light Bulb.png|Light Bulb on tree Boulderbough Glow Berry.png|Glow Berry on tree Boulderbough Lichen.png|Lichen on tree Boulderbough Silk.png|Silk on tree Boulderbough Tentacle Spot.png|Tentacle Spot on tree Boulderbough Bone Shards.png|Bone Shards on tree Boulderbough Broken Shell.png|Broken Shell on tree Boulderbough Fossils.png|Fossils on tree Boulderbough Thulecite Fragments.png|Thulecite Fragments on tree Boulderbough Guano.png|Guano on tree Boulderbough Poop.png|Poop on tree Boulderbough Accursed Trinket.png|Accursed Trinket on tree =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == RWP AE Boulderbough Concept Art.png|Boulderbough Concept Art from ''Rhymes with Play'' stream.
